params.prompt: Create a premium 4:5 Instagram PROGRAM GRAPHIC for Limitless Club. Concept: AI Agent Team Dashboard. Course title: HERMES AGENT. Subtitle: Multi-Agent AI Masterclass. Dark Midnight Luxe Editorial design, black/graphite/silver typography with electric blue UI glow. Show three elegant agent dashboard cards as the hero visual: Chief of Staff Agent, Content Agent, Vibe Coding Agent, connected by thin glowing lines. Required text: LIMITLESS CLUB; HERMES AGENT; Multi-Agent AI Masterclass; Build the team that never sleeps.; คอร์สที่จะเปลี่ยน AI ให้เป็น “ทีมงาน” ของคุณ; สร้างทีม AI Agent ที่ทำงาน 24/7; By Jedi Trinupab · @jeditrinupab. Avoid humanoid robot dominating the poster; make it feel like a premium business operating system. Clean hierarchy, mobile readable, safe margins, no extra logos, no misspelled or duplicate text.
